response.global_summary: The video shows a live performance by the virtual performer Rindo Chihaya (輪堂千速) at her birthday live event "CHIHAYA BIRTHDAY FES". The song performed is titled "Flat out", composed by Karasuyasabou (カラスヤサボウ). The video features the song performance from start to finish.

scenes.description: The virtual performer Rindo Chihaya starts her performance on stage in front of a live audience. The song 'Flat out' is played. The song continues until the end of the video. The video contains on-screen lyrics.
